message:
fix(connectors): huggingface test surface_status, mistral embeddings input validation

Huggingface introspect test expected "live" but implementation returns
"incubating" — fix test to match. Mistral embeddings silently used entire
input object when "input" field was missing, producing invalid API requests;
now returns InvalidRequest error matching the declared schema.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
